tuning: E A D G B E
content:
To understand even more.. watch this tutorial 
 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WQliobGE9Hg

[Intro]
[ch]F[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                                   [ch]Am[/ch]
Picture perfect memories scattered all around the floor[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                                  [ch]Am[/ch]
Reaching for the phone 'cause I can't fight it anymore[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F[/ch]                            [ch]Am[/ch]
And I wonder if I ever cross your mind[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]
For me it happens all the time[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]                                      [ch]Em[/ch]
It's a quarter after one, I'm all alone and I need you now[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                                  [ch]Em[/ch]
Said I wouldn't call, but I lost all control and I need you now[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]                               [ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]
And I don't know how I can do without, I just need you now[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab] [ch]F[/ch]                                                 [ch]Am[/ch]
Another shot of whiskey, can't stop looking at the door[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                                 [ch]Am[/ch]
Wishing you'd come sweeping in the way you did before[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F[/ch]                            [ch]Am[/ch]
And I wonder if I ever cross your mind[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]
For me it happens all the time[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]                                           [ch]Em[/ch]
It's a quarter after one, I'm a little drunk and I need you now[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                                  [ch]Em[/ch]
Said I wouldn't call, but I lost all control and I need you now[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]                               [ch]F[/ch]               
And I don't know how I can do without, I just need you now[/tab]

[Bridge]
[ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Gsus[/ch] (x2)
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]                               [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Yes I'd rather hurt than feel nothing at all[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]                                      [ch]Em[/ch]
It's a quarter after one, I'm all alone and I need you now[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]                                                  [ch]Em[/ch]
And I said I wouldn't call, but I'm a little drunk and I need you now[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]                               [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]
And I don't know how I can do without, I just need you now[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
 I just need you now[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
 Oh baby I need you now[/tab]
